name: BACARDÍ Spiced
title: BACARDÍ Spiced Rum | Spice Rum | 35% Proof | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A rum with charisma that adds both light and deep notes to your drink.
marketing_description: BACARDÍ Spiced charms its way to your taste buds. Made with aged rum and with a hint of smokiness from charred American oak barrels, BACARDÍ Spiced is a Gluten free rum blended with natural flavours and spices for a bold, yet smooth taste. The BACARDÍ Spiced liquid has both light and deep notes, making it perfect for mixing spiced rum drinks.
tasting_notes: BACARDÍ Spiced has upfront notes of creamy delicious vanilla, woody and subtle honey through the mid-palette, and a natural cinnamon and nutmeg spice finish.
process: Made with aged rum and with a hint of smokiness from charred American oak barrels.
how_to_serve: Perfect for mixing spiced rum drinks. Perfect to enjoy ice cold with cola or ginger beer.

faq_items.question: What is spiced rum?
faq_items.answer: Spiced rum is often aged for as long as dark rum, but has added spices and caramel coloring. It usually carries a bold, yet smooth taste.

faq_items.question: Is spiced rum the same as gold rum?
faq_items.answer: No, spiced rum typically has added spices and flavourings to give it a bold, unique flavour, whereas gold rums tend to be more mellow.

faq_items.question: How do you make rum?
faq_items.answer: Rum is made using only three ingredients: molasses from sugarcane, yeast and water. Ingredients are fermented, then distilled, aged, filtered and blended.
